description_text: Organizational Specification for the role of IT Business Analyst. The core responsibility of the IT Business Analyst is to deliver high-quality outcomes within our business unit. Essential skills for this role include extensive experience in Business Analysis, UML, Agile. Additionally, the candidate should demonstrate ability in Requirements Gathering. Excellent verbal and written communication is required. Familiarity with collaborative environment, stakeholder communication is desirable.

Excellent verbal and written communication is required. Familiarity with collaborative environment, stakeholder communication is desirable.
